requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — NTP IEC 60335-2-40 and 60 Hz Grid Frequency Compatibility
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——NTP IEC 60335-2-40与60 Hz电网频率兼容性
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——NTP IEC 60335-2-40與60 Hz電網頻率相容性

summary.en: Peru's applicable electrical safety standard for heat pumps and air conditioners is NTP IEC 60335-2-40, which adopts IEC 60335-2-40 (safety of household and similar electrical appliances — particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers). Products must be tested and shown to comply with this standard. A critical hardware consideration is that Peru operates at 220 V / 60 Hz (single-phase residential), whereas China operates at 220 V / 50 Hz. Although the nominal voltage is the same, the 60 Hz frequency makes Chinese 50 Hz compressor motors and drive components NOT directly compatible: compressors, fan motors, and other induction-motor components designed for 50 Hz will run at incorrect speed and reduced efficiency at 60 Hz, and may overheat or fail. Equipment exported to Peru must be designed or re-specified for 60 Hz operation. Safety testing under NTP IEC 60335-2-40 must be performed at the 60 Hz rated conditions.
summary.zh: 秘鲁适用于热泵和空调的电气安全标准为NTP IEC 60335-2-40，采用IEC 60335-2-40（家用和类似用途电器的安全——热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求）。产品须经过测试并符合该标准。关键硬件注意事项：秘鲁采用220 V / 60 Hz（单相住宅），而中国采用220 V / 50 Hz。尽管额定电压相同，60 Hz频率使中国50 Hz压缩机电机和驱动部件无法直接兼容：为50 Hz设计的压缩机、风机电机和其他感应电机部件在60 Hz下将以错误转速运行，效率降低，并可能过热或损坏。出口至秘鲁的设备须专为60 Hz运行而设计或重新规格化。NTP IEC 60335-2-40安全测试须在额定60 Hz条件下进行。
summary.zht: 秘魯適用於熱泵和空調的電氣安全標準為NTP IEC 60335-2-40，採用IEC 60335-2-40（家用和類似用途電器的安全——熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求）。產品須經過測試並符合該標準。關鍵硬件注意事項：秘魯採用220 V / 60 Hz（單相住宅），而中國採用220 V / 50 Hz。儘管額定電壓相同，60 Hz頻率使中國50 Hz壓縮機電機和驅動部件無法直接相容：為50 Hz設計的壓縮機、風機電機和其他感應電機部件在60 Hz下將以錯誤轉速運行，效率降低，並可能過熱或損毀。出口至秘魯的設備須專為60 Hz運行而設計或重新規格化。NTP IEC 60335-2-40安全測試須在額定60 Hz條件下進行。

standards_or_laws: NTP IEC 60335-2-40 — Seguridad de los aparatos electrodomésticos y análogos — Requisitos particulares para bombas de calor eléctricas, aparatos de aire acondicionado y deshumidificadores (adopted from IEC 60335-2-40)
Peru grid: 220 V / 60 Hz single-phase residential (MINEM electrical grid specification)

summary.en: China requires mandatory CCC safety certification for household air conditioners and heat pumps under GB 4706.32 (safety of household and similar electrical appliances — particular requirements for air conditioners), tested at 220 V / 50 Hz. Chinese CCC certificates and GB 4706.32 test reports at 50 Hz are not accepted as evidence of NTP IEC 60335-2-40 compliance in Peru. The critical gap is not only the test standard pathway but the fundamental 60 Hz vs 50 Hz frequency difference that makes Chinese 50 Hz compressor designs physically incompatible with the Peruvian grid.
summary.zh: 中国对家用空调和热泵强制实施CCC安全认证，依据GB 4706.32（家用和类似用途电器的安全——空调器的特殊要求），在220 V / 50 Hz条件下测试。中国CCC证书和50 Hz下的GB 4706.32测试报告不被秘鲁接受为NTP IEC 60335-2-40合规证明。关键差距不仅在于测试标准路径，更在于60 Hz与50 Hz频率的根本差异，使中国50 Hz压缩机设计与秘鲁电网存在物理不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國對家用空調和熱泵強制實施CCC安全認證，依據GB 4706.32（家用和類似用途電器的安全——空調器的特殊要求），在220 V / 50 Hz條件下測試。中國CCC證書和50 Hz下的GB 4706.32測試報告不被秘魯接受為NTP IEC 60335-2-40合規證明。關鍵差距不僅在於測試標準路徑，更在於60 Hz與50 Hz頻率的根本差異，使中國50 Hz壓縮機設計與秘魯電網存在物理不相容。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 (household electrical appliances safety — particular requirements for air conditioners, 50 Hz)

gap.en: This is the most fundamental hardware gap: Chinese 50 Hz heat pump compressors and motors are physically incompatible with Peru's 60 Hz grid and cannot simply be re-labelled or re-documented. Compressor and motor components must be redesigned or re-sourced for 60 Hz operation before any safety testing is meaningful. Safety testing under NTP IEC 60335-2-40 must be conducted at 60 Hz rated conditions using INDECOPI-recognized accredited laboratories. CCC certificates and 50 Hz test data are not accepted as substitutes.
gap.zh: 这是最根本的硬件差距：中国50 Hz热泵压缩机和电机与秘鲁60 Hz电网存在物理不兼容，不能简单地重新贴标或重新提交文件。压缩机和电机部件须在进行任何有意义的安全测试之前重新设计或重新选型以适应60 Hz运行。NTP IEC 60335-2-40安全测试须在额定60 Hz条件下，由INDECOPI认可的认可实验室进行。CCC证书和50 Hz测试数据不被接受为替代证明。
gap.zht: 這是最根本的硬件差距：中國50 Hz熱泵壓縮機和電機與秘魯60 Hz電網存在物理不相容，不能簡單地重新貼標或重新提交文件。壓縮機和電機部件須在進行任何有意義的安全測試之前重新設計或重新選型以適應60 Hz運行。NTP IEC 60335-2-40安全測試須在額定60 Hz條件下，由INDECOPI認可的認可實驗室進行。CCC證書和50 Hz測試數據不被接受為替代證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NTP IEC 60335-2-40 compliance at 60 Hz required; physical 60 Hz hardware redesign required for Chinese 50 Hz designs
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CCC under GB 4706.32 at 50 Hz; not recognized in Peru and not frequency-compatible

source.publisher: INDECOPI — Instituto Nacional de Defensa de la Competencia y de la Protección de la Propiedad Intelectual, Peru

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Critical gap — Chinese 50 Hz compressor and motor designs are physically incompatible with Peru's 60 Hz grid and must be redesigned; CCC and GB 4706.32 test data at 50 Hz are not accepted; NTP IEC 60335-2-40 testing at 60 Hz is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 关键差距——中国50 Hz压缩机和电机设计与秘鲁60 Hz电网存在物理不兼容，须重新设计；50 Hz下的CCC和GB 4706.32测试数据不被接受；须按NTP IEC 60335-2-40在60 Hz条件下进行测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 關鍵差距——中國50 Hz壓縮機和電機設計與秘魯60 Hz電網存在物理不相容，須重新設計；50 Hz下的CCC和GB 4706.32測試數據不被接受；須按NTP IEC 60335-2-40在60 Hz條件下進行測試。
